chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 3054 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.13128/2021 2. For hearing of main case 25.03.2025 Messrs. Hamza Waheed and Sami-ur-Rehman, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Ameer Bakhsh Metlo, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Learned counsel for the petitioner demonstrates from the record that this petition is squarely covered by Division Bench judgment of this Court reported as 2023 PTD 576 (Wazir Ali Industries ltd. vs. Federation of Pakistan and others), upheld by the Hon’ble Supreme Court in Civil Petition No.2375 of 2023. Learned counsel states that the ratio of the above judgment is binding upon this Division Bench per the multiline principle. Learned counsel for respondent department did not controvert the aforesaid. In view hereof this petition is also disposed of for the same reasons and upon the same terms as the judgment mentioned supra. Judge Judge Amjad
